# Structured Evidence for Reliable LVLMs

## Introduction

Large vision-language models may produce answers that conflict with visible
image content.

## Method

Our LVLM hallucination mitigation method retrieves visual evidence from image
regions and verifies uncertain answers before generation.

## Experiments

We evaluate visual evidence grounding on POPE using hallucination rate,
accuracy, and inference cost.

## Limitations

The visual evidence retriever can fail when relevant image regions are small or
occluded.
